search.title: Find your stop
search.description: Search for a stop by name (e.g. 'Central Station', 'Town Hall')

select.title: Select stop
select.description: Choose the stop you want to monitor

routes.title: Select routes
routes.description: Choose which line + direction combinations to monitor. Only departures matching your selection will be shown.

options.title: Display options
options.description: Configure how many departures to show and how far ahead to look

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SL API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found. Try a different search term.

routes.title: Select routes
routes.description: Choose which line + direction combinations to monitor. Only departures matching your selection will be shown.
